candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Explicit cash and cash equivalents balance sheet line; preferred reported cash line.
Also a cash balance line, likely alternate label used in some periods.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents, restricted funds
candidates.why: Restricted cash should generally be excluded from baseline cash equivalents if a cleaner unrestricted line exists.

variables.notes: Provided both capitalization variants as a priority list for changing labels across years; excluded restricted funds.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line rather than reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best direct IFRS-style current debt line; captures short-term interest-bearing debt and is cleaner than lease-specific or maturity-detail components.
Current portion of long-term debt, but may be only a component of total current interest-bearing liabilities.
Semantically ideal, but appears unpopulated in preview; use only if present in some years.

variables.notes: Used 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' as primary STD measure. Added 'Short Term Debt, Total' as fallback if used in other years. Excluded lease rows and did not combine with 'LT Debt Maturing Within 1 Year' to avoid double counting against the broader current interest-bearing total.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Best reported total/net PPE-style line for tangible fixed assets.
Also a broad PPE-style total line; useful alternate label across years.
Gross component only, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Provided the broad reported tangible-asset totals as priority labels across years; preferred these over component rows and over right-of-use assets.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact match for operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities

variables.notes: Selected the explicit operating cash flow line.
